title: Against the Gods Episode 22 Indonesia, English Sub
description:
English

In Cangyun Mainland, Medicine Cultivator Yun Gu was brutally murdered for possessing one of the 7 Heavenly Treasures, the Sky Poison Pearl, which made her the object of desire of the entire world. Yun Che, her disciple, brought the treasure to take revenge on his master and caused endless bloodshed in the process. Finally, he was cornered by a formidable foe at Jueyun Cliff. Unyielding, Yun Che swallowed the poison pearl and jumped off the cliff to his death. However, guided by an unknown force, his consciousness traversed time and space, awakening in the body of a boy named Xiao Che in Liuyun City in Tianxuan Mainland. Xiao Che was born with damaged internal blood vessels, rendering him incapable of cultivating internal energy. He was widely ridiculed as the infamous scum of Liuyun Town. Due to an agreement between their parents, he suddenly married Xia Qingyue, the most beautiful woman in the city and a disciple of the Ice Wind Immortal Palace. Jealousy took hold of Xiao Yulong, a member of the same clan, and on Xiao Che's wedding day, he attempted to poison him. However, thanks to Yun Che's time travel experience, Xiao Che managed to survive, combining the experiences of two lives into one. Through a series of fortunate events, he also harbored the soul of the mysterious and extremely talented girl, Jasmine, who lived within the Sky Poison Pearl. From then on, he embarks on a strange and unpredictable path filled with extraordinary challenges.

Indonesia

Di Daratan Cangyun, Kultivator Pengobatan Yun Gu dibunuh secara brutal karena memiliki salah satu dari 7 Harta Karun Surgawi, Mutiara Racun Langit, yang menjadikannya objek keinginan seluruh dunia. Yun Che, muridnya, membawa harta itu untuk membalas dendam kepada tuannya dan menyebabkan pertumpahan darah yang tak ada habisnya dalam prosesnya. Akhirnya, dia terpojok oleh musuh tangguh di Tebing Jueyun. Pantang menyerah, Yun Che menelan mutiara racun dan melompat dari tebing menuju kematiannya. Namun, dipandu oleh kekuatan yang tidak diketahui, kesadarannya melintasi ruang dan waktu, terbangun dalam tubuh seorang anak laki-laki bernama Xiao Che di Kota Liuyun di Daratan Tianxuan. Xiao Che terlahir dengan pembuluh darah dalam yang rusak, membuatnya tidak mampu mengolah energi dalam. Dia secara luas diejek sebagai sampah terkenal di Kota Liuyun. Karena perjanjian antara orang tua mereka, dia tiba-tiba menikahi Xia Qingyue, wanita tercantik di kota dan murid Istana Abadi Angin Es. Kecemburuan menguasai Xiao Yulong, anggota klan yang sama, dan pada hari pernikahan Xiao Che, dia berusaha meracuninya. Namun, berkat pengalaman perjalanan waktu Yun Che, Xiao Che berhasil bertahan, menggabungkan pengalaman dua kehidupan menjadi satu. Melalui serangkaian peristiwa yang menguntungkan, ia juga memendam jiwa gadis misterius dan sangat berbakat, Jasmine, yang tinggal di dalam Mutiara Racun Langit. Sejak saat itu, ia memulai jalan yang aneh dan tak terduga yang penuh dengan tantangan luar biasa.

Against the Gods Subtitle Indonesia, English, Portuguese, Turkish, Spanish, Italian, Polish, Arabic, Thai, German
